task_completion.description: Organize bookmarks into the required folders
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks bar is visible, showing the specific folders: 'Patent Databases', 'Non-Patent Literature', 'Internal Systems', and 'Personal'.
Chrome Settings (Sync and Google services / Privacy and security) showing the toggle for 'Improve search suggestions' or 'Autocomplete searches and URLs' set to the OFF position.
Chrome Settings > Site Settings > Additional content settings > PDF documents showing the option 'Download PDFs' selected instead of 'Open PDFs in Chrome'.

task_completion.description: Add pop-up exceptions for internal sites
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Site Settings > Pop-ups and redirects showing internal sites (e.g., uspto.gov) added to the 'Allowed to send pop-ups and use redirects' list.

task_completion.description: Create the required custom search engines
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search showing newly added custom site search entries (likely related to patent databases or USPTO).

task_completion.description: Sanitize the browser history of personal browsing while keeping work domains
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History page showing retained work domains (e.g., patents.google.com, uspto.gov, ieeexplore.ieee.org) and an absence of the personal domains listed in the privileged info (e.g., cnn.com, youtube.com, amazon.com).

integrity.description: Agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Chrome browser interface and settings menus being navigated, rather than terminal windows modifying Chrome SQLite databases or preferences files directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass manual configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of Python, bash scripts, or automated profile-injection tools running in a terminal to alter the browser state.

integrity.description: Agent deleted history items via the browser UI
integrity.visual_evidence: History deletion appears to be done via the Chrome History UI (selecting checkboxes and clicking delete) rather than clearing the entire history indiscriminately or using command-line tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required bookmark folders: 'Patent Databases', 'Non-Patent Literature', 'Internal Systems', 'Personal'. Personal domains to purge from history: cnn.com, bbc.com, youtube.com, amazon.com, netflix.com, espn.com, twitter.com, facebook.com, instagram.com, reddit.com, weather.com, zillow.com, yelp.com, tripadvisor.com, spotify.com. Work domains to keep in history: patents.google.com, patentscope.wipo.int, uspto.gov, ieeexplore.ieee.org, pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov. Required live workspace tabs: patents.google, ieeexplore, uspto.gov.
